apply_policy.reason: Human review required before WordPress REST or WP-CLI apply. This WordPress site has no staging environment, so any apply target is production.
required_before_apply: Resolve WordPress page_id for each row
Verify author names and credentials with Maxx Builders
Verify project proof claims against Maxx Builders source records
Take a production backup or confirm a recent restorable host backup
Export current affected post/page content and SEO meta before writing
Apply only a small approved batch during a low-traffic window
Verify rendered page source and search snippets after each batch
Snapshot base values and escalate on drift

global_guardrails: No llms.txt claims as a Google ranking or citation hack
No live publishing from this manifest

canonical_slug_rows.recommended_action: Use the final canonical URL in SEO tooling and internal links. Keep the old URL as a redirect only if it has link equity.

canonical_slug_rows.recommended_action: Prefer the clean slug /design-build-construction-houston/ as the final canonical if WordPress can safely swap it. Otherwise update config and internal links to the -2 slug.
canonical_slug_rows.blocked_apply_reason: Slug/canonical decision affects redirects and should not be automated from this manifest.
